data.title: Nicklaus Children's Hospital joins CBTN for pediatric brain tumor research, strengthening efforts to help children.
data.description: On September 25, 2025, in Philadelphia, the Children's Brain Tumor Network (CBTN) announced the addition of Nicklaus Children's Hospital as a new member institution. This partnership expands CBTN's national presence and bolsters their mission to advance research for children facing brain tumors. Dr. Toba Niazi, Chief of Neurosurgery at Nicklaus Children's Hospital, expressed enthusiasm about joining forces with CBTN in this endeavor.

data.title: Hyundai donates $25,000 to Baystate Health Foundation for car seat safety, partnership provided 220+ seats to families.
data.description: Hyundai has contributed $25,000 to the Baystate Health Foundation in aid of its Pediatric Trauma Surgery Injury Prevention Car Seat Program. This collaboration, which began in 2023, has already resulted in the provision of over 220 car and booster seats to families facing financial constraints. The donation was made public in Holyoke, Massachusetts on September 25, 2025.

data.title: MT Sobek reveals new adventures for 2026, continuing its legacy since 1969 with immersive travel experiences.
data.description: A notable adventure travel company, MT Sobek, based in Emeryville, California, has been a frontrunner in immersive travel experiences since 1969. Recently, on September 25, 2025, the company announced the launch of its exciting new trips for the upcoming year 2026. Known for their innovative approach, MT Sobek remains at the forefront by introducing unique and thrilling adventures for travelers.

data.title: Genesis, U.S. Soccer Foundation, and MLSPA open mini-pitch in Georgia with the 4th Musco Mini-Pitch System installation.
data.description: Celebrating the grand opening of a new mini-pitch in City of South Fulton, Georgia, just outside of Atlanta, are Genesis, the U.S. Soccer Foundation, and the MLS Players Association (MLSPA). This marks the establishment of the fourth Musco Mini-Pitch Systems™ installation. The pitch aims to promote community sports by providing a dedicated space for soccer enthusiasts.

data.title: Moses Singer launched an interactive heatmap detailing Right of Publicity laws in all 50 states. Important for protecting name, image, and likeness online.
data.description: In New York, Moses Singer law firm has launched an online heatmap detailing the legal protections surrounding the rights of publicity in all 50 states. In an era where exploiting or misusing an individual's name, image, and likeness is increasingly common, comprehending these legal safeguards has become crucial. The heatmap offers an extensive examination of both common law and statutory regulations protecting publicity rights nationwide. This resource serves as a valuable tool in navigating the intricate web of laws governing these rights.

Putin called ensuring the nuclear security of atomic facilities an absolute priority for the Russian Federation.

data.title: Jabil beats Q4 2025 expectations, with $3.29 EPS (vs $2.92 est.) and $8.25B net revenue (vs $7.59B est.), eyeing strong 2026.
data.description: Jabil (JBL) saw a drop in shares despite exceeding expectations in their fiscal fourth-quarter 2025 results. With adjusted earnings per share at $3.29, surpassing the analyst consensus of $2.92, the company displayed a positive performance. Quarterly net revenue stood at $8.25 billion, reflecting an 18.5% year-over-year increase, outperforming the $7.59 billion estimate. Regulated Industries revenue experienced a 3% Y/Y growth. Further, Jabil provided an optimistic forecast for the upcoming quarter and fiscal year 2026. The company looks poised for growth as AI revenue surges and various markets recover.

data.title: Inventiva (NASDAQ: IVA) set to report EPS of $-0.41 on 2025-09-26. Investors await news eagerly.
data.description: Inventiva (NASDAQ: IVA) is scheduled to release its most recent quarterly financial results on Friday, September 26, 2025. Analysts predict that the company will disclose an earnings per share (EPS) of -$0.41. Investors are highly anticipating this announcement from Inventiva, hoping for positive news regarding exceeding expectations. For more detailed information, visit a comprehensive article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: BlackBerry stock slips despite strong Q2. Revenue at $129.6 million, up 3% YoY, beating estimates. Adjusted gross margin at 75%. QNX revenue up 15% YoY to $63.1 million. Secure Communications revenue surpasses guidance at $59.9 million. CEO highlights shift to system-critical software.
data.description: BlackBerry (BB) stock saw a decline following the release of its Q2 results. The company reported earnings of $0.04 per share, surpassing the expected $0.01. Quarterly revenue stood at $129.6 million, a 3% increase from last year, beating the estimated $122.1 million. Adjusted gross margin was reported at 75%, up 430 basis points. QNX revenue grew by 15% YoY to $63.1 million with an 83% adjusted gross margin. Secure Communications revenue exceeded projections at $59.9 million. The stock market responded negatively to these results. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Listrak and Rivo collaborate to enhance retail loyalty programs, boosting customer retention and engagement. Little. Pa., Sep 25, 2025.
data.description: Listrak, a marketing automation platform based in Lititz, Pennsylvania, revealed on September 25, 2025, that their integration has led to increased levels of customer retention and engagement for retail marketers. This platform is designed to help leading retailers and brands achieve measurable growth.

data.title: CrossWind's Valcour Cloud™ CAD/RMS awarded top public safety solution of 2025 by GovCIO Outlook, praised as the nation's first statewide cloud-native CAD/RMS SaaS implementation and blueprint for New England agencies.
data.description: Valcour Cloud™ has been recognized as the leading cloud-native CAD/RMS SaaS implementation in the nation, setting a precedent for New England agencies grappling with the replacement of outdated CAD/RMS platforms. This award highlights its innovative approach and success in revolutionizing emergency response systems. The accolade was announced in Santa Cruz, California on September 25, 2025, by CrossWind, underlining the platform's significance in the industry. This achievement positions Valcour Cloud™ as a model for agencies with approximately 100,000 emergency calls annually in New England, providing a solution for the technological advancements required to enhance operational efficiency and data management in emergency services.

data.title: WAVE Ventures partners with University of Michigan to launch Deep Tech venture studio in Ann Arbor.
data.description: A new Deep Tech venture studio has been established in Ann Arbor, Michigan by WAVE Ventures in partnership with the University of Michigan's Innovation Partnerships. This collaboration aims to foster innovation and support tech startups. The venture studio will provide essential resources and support to entrepreneurs, leveraging cutting-edge technologies. This initiative signifies a significant step towards nurturing a vibrant tech ecosystem in the region.

data.title: Significant growth expected in new oil and gas transmission pipeline projects by 2030, with 549 anticipated projects, including 402 gas pipelines.
data.description: In Dublin, a report titled "New Build Oil and Gas Transmission Pipelines Projects Outlook to 2030" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The global oil and gas trunk/transmission pipeline sector is expected to experience significant expansion between 2025 and 2030, driven by increasing energy consumption and initiatives to bolster energy stability. Out of the projected 549 pipeline projects scheduled to begin operations in this period, 402 are related to gas transmission while 73 are focused on oil.
